User.title: User
User.description: User profile containing points and supported teams

id.description: The unique Firebase Auth User UID

supportedTeams.description: An array of 3 teams supported by the user

totalPoints.description: The cumulative score including predictions and team penalties

authUid.description: The unique Firebase Auth authentication identifier

pin.description: The 4-digit numeric PIN for secure login fallback

matchDate.description: Date and optionally time of kickoff

homeScoreActual.description: Actual goals scored by home team

awayScoreActual.description: Actual goals scored by away team

Prediction.title: Prediction
Prediction.description: A user's score prediction for a match

userId.description: The UID of the user who made the prediction

matchId.description: The ID of the match predicted

homeScorePredicted.description: Predicted goals for the home team

awayScorePredicted.description: Predicted goals for the away team

pointsEarned.description: Calculated points earned for this prediction

matches/{matchId}.description: Accessing and storing World Cup fixtures
